home.metaDescription: Book verified local tours across Ethiopia and beyond with ExpeditionLocal.

hero.subtitle: Beyond the tourist maps lie sunlit highlands, rock-hewn sanctuaries, and ancient streets where time moves at the speed of a highland breeze.
hero.testimonialQuote: The secret isn't just seeing Ethiopia — it's tasting the coffee ceremony and the history in the soil.

trending.title: Trending Destinations

featured.title: Featured Journeys
featured.subtitle: Handpicked experiences by our travel editors.

difference.title: The ExpeditionLocal Difference
difference.subtitle: We believe travel should be authentic, seamless, and unforgettable. Here's how we make it happen.

vetted.title: Vetted Local Experts
vetted.description: Every guide is rigorously verified for safety, knowledge, and their ability to deliver exceptional narrative experiences.

groups.title: Small Group Focus
groups.description: We cap our group sizes to ensure intimate, personalized interactions and lighter footprints in sensitive locations.

access.title: Unique Access
access.description: Skip the lines and gain exclusive entry to hidden gems that most standard tours simply cannot provide.

howItWorks.title: How ExpeditionLocal Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Booking your next great adventure is simple, secure, and fully managed through our expert platform.

discover.title: 1. Discover
discover.description: Search thousands of verified tours by destination, date, or interest type.

book.title: 2. Secure Booking
book.description: Book safely with trusted local agencies, backed by our quality guarantee.

experience.title: 3. Experience
experience.description: Meet your expert guide and embark on an unforgettable local journey.

hero.quote: Your journey into the extraordinary begins with a single step. Join trusted local experts and discover remarkable places with confidence.
